name: Dalrymple Bay Infrastructure Limited
analysis: DBI has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$5.6580. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$5.6580, stop A$5.2668, target A$5.9400. Risk/reward is 0.72:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
